description: READ-ONLY access to the on-disk image library (7 category folders + 2 loose root JPGs). Enforces the 'MUST keep images in their existing folders' behavioral rule (claude.md #2). NEVER add a write permission to this file — that breaks the read-only invariant. Companion: capabilities/app-writable.json. SOP: architecture/08-tauri-filesystem.md § Path Scopes #1. Each category folder needs both the bare path (for readDir) and the /** glob (for file reads).
